gemini_closing_question_fa: rendering-bridge Fal.ai یا Apple Store webhooks؟
answer_fa: هیچ‌کدام اول. ترتیب SourceA: billing → orchestration (همین) → rendering-bridge → StoreKit. Fal فقط بعد از tier gate و HUMAN_APPROVAL.
answer_en: Neither first — billing spine → orchestration (this module) → Fal rendering-bridge → StoreKit when iOS WORK order lands.
